purpose: Allow-list of EXISTING client-side direct writes to protected wallet/ledger tables (Sprint 0A snapshot). Rule audit-v6/no-direct-wallet-ledger-writes blocks NEW writes; cleanup of these baselined sites is deferred to a later phase.

entries.excerpt: .from("gift_credits").insert({ admin_id: user.id, amount, reason, target_type, target_value, ... })
entries.note: Admin gift credit issuance — direct insert from admin UI. Should be moved to an edge function with server-side admin role check + reconciliation.
CRITICAL — admin UI mutates wallet_transactions.status directly, bypassing server-side reconciliation. Top priority for Phase 0C fix.
